game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Zombie Night Terror**: Players command a horde of automatically walking zombies in 2D pixel-art levels, strategically using mutations to overcome environmental puzzles and human defenses. Players tap on individual zombies or locations to assign specific mutations from a bottom-screen UI, such as "Blocker" to halt a zombie, "Exploder" to destroy obstacles, or "Jumper" to clear gaps. Humans convert into new zombies upon contact, expanding the horde, while the "Mutation System" allows players to evolve zombies into specialized types like "Runner" or "Tank" by spending "mutation points" earned from infections. Levels feature destructible environments, which certain zombie types can exploit to create new paths, and progression is linear through over 40 levels. The objective is to infect all target humans or reach an exit with a minimum horde size, with failure occurring if all zombies are eliminated or a critical human escapes.
game_info.description: Command your zombie horde through dangerous facilities! Your zombies walk automatically, but you must strategically mutate them to overcome obstacles and defenses. Convert all humans to grow your horde, destroy barriers with exploders, and reach the exit. Manage your mutation points wisely—they're earned by infecting humans. Fail if all zombies die or critical humans escape!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move camera view left/right
Number Keys 1-5: Select mutation type (1=Blocker, 2=Exploder, 3=Jumper, 4=Runner, 5=Tank)
Space: Apply selected mutation to nearest zombie
Z: Quick-select Blocker mutation
Shift: Speed up time (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic zombie movement and camera controls. Validates that zombies spawn, walk automatically, and the player can pan the camera to follow them. This ensures core mechanics work.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Spawn zombies and let them walk naturally. Pan camera left and right using arrow keys to track zombie movement. Verify position changes occur correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Zombies should move horizontally at a constant speed. Camera should pan smoothly. Position tracking should show continuous movement without getting stuck.

TEST_1.expected: Zombies should move horizontally at a constant speed. Camera should pan smoothly. Position tracking should show continuous movement without getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal win strategy by efficiently converting humans and reaching the exit. Uses strategic mutations to overcome obstacles and maximize infection rate to win the level.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy Blocker mutations to control zombie flow. Use Exploders to destroy barriers. Apply Jumper mutations to cross gaps. Convert all humans to grow the horde, then guide zombies to the exit with sufficient numbers.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully infect all target humans, accumulate mutation points, overcome all obstacles, and reach the exit with the required minimum horde size. Game state should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests mutation system mechanics and point management. Validates that mutations can be selected, applied, and consume the correct amount of points. Ensures mutation effects work as intended.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Select different mutation types using number keys. Apply mutations to zombies using Space. Verify point deduction and visual feedback. Test each mutation type's special ability.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Mutations should be selectable, cost the correct points, apply successfully to zombies, and grant appropriate abilities. UI should reflect current selection and available points.
TEST_3.description: Tests mutation system mechanics and point management. Validates that mutations can be selected, applied, and consume the correct amount of points. Ensures mutation effects work as intended.
TEST_3.strategy: Select different mutation types using number keys. Apply mutations to zombies using Space. Verify point deduction and visual feedback. Test each mutation type's special ability.
TEST_3.expected: Mutations should be selectable, cost the correct points, apply successfully to zombies, and grant appropriate abilities. UI should reflect current selection and available points.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests human-zombie interaction and infection mechanics. Validates collision detection between zombies and humans, conversion process, and horde growth.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Guide zombies toward humans. Verify collision detection triggers infection. Check that humans convert to zombies upon contact. Monitor mutation point gain from infections.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Humans should convert to zombies on contact. Horde size should increase. Mutation points should be awarded. Converted zombies should join the horde and begin walking.
TEST_4.description: Tests human-zombie interaction and infection mechanics. Validates collision detection between zombies and humans, conversion process, and horde growth.
TEST_4.strategy: Guide zombies toward humans. Verify collision detection triggers infection. Check that humans convert to zombies upon contact. Monitor mutation point gain from infections.
TEST_4.expected: Humans should convert to zombies on contact. Horde size should increase. Mutation points should be awarded. Converted zombies should join the horde and begin walking.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests lose conditions including zombie elimination and human escape. Validates that the game properly detects failure states.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Allow all zombies to fall into pits or be eliminated by hazards. Alternatively, let critical humans reach escape points. Monitor game state transitions.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when all zombies are eliminated or a critical human escapes. Appropriate lose message should display.
